llm_keywords.evidence: Current rises at every listed step from 5.000e-12 A at 0.00 V to 2.203e-05 A at 5.00 V with no decreases.
Between 0.00 V and 2.40 V, current changes from 5.000e-12 A to 2.110e-11 A, which is less than one order of magnitude.
Current changes from 2.110e-11 A at 2.40 V to 1.000e-09 A at 2.50 V, an increase of about 47 times in a 0.10 V step.
From 2.50 V to 5.00 V, current increases from 1.000e-09 A to 2.203e-05 A, about 4.34 decades.
The absolute current spans from 5.000e-12 A to 2.203e-05 A, corresponding to about 6.64 decades.
